Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And For Sanctions Against Pl And His Attornye
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Alan Valboni, Remo Valbonsi and Maria Valbonesi's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories is granted. The responses were timely served by mail on July 10, 2008.

70.1 - 70.13
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Contention interrogatories are specifically authorized by CCP Section 2030.010(b).

12.1, 12.3, 12.4, 12.5, 12.7, 13.1, 13.2
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. The responses to interrogatories 12.4 and 12.5 may otherwise be sufficient.

Plaintiff shall serve further verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that plaintiff asserted unmeritorious objections without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $640 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Set For Trial On Jan-26-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-21-09 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 306
